home.title: Satellite-Based Crop Insurance
home.subtitle: Fast, transparent, and accurate claim processing powered by Google Earth Engine NDVI analysis and Machine Learning.
home.for_farmers_desc: Easily submit your crop insurance claim. Draw your farm boundary on our interactive map, select the extreme weather event, and track your claim status in real-time.
home.for_admins_desc: Verify claims rapidly using AI-powered insights. Review satellite NDVI difference maps, damage percentage estimates, and our ML model's recommendation.

new_claim.title: Submit New Crop Insurance Claim
new_claim.location_desc: Use the mapping tool on the left to draw the boundary of the affected field.
new_claim.error_polygon: Please draw your farm boundary on the map.
new_claim.error_submit: Failed to submit claim. Please try again.

map.tooltip_start: Click to start drawing farm boundary.
map.tooltip_end: Click first point or double-click to complete polygon.

status.enter_id: Enter Claim ID or Phone Number
status.not_found: Claim not found. Please check your Claim ID or Phone Number.
status.name: Name
status.timeline: Estimated Verification Timeline: 7-14 business days subject to field officer inspection.

fraud.title: AI Fraud Risk Assessment
fraud.desc: Analyzed via coordinate topology, historical frequency, and NDVI consistency.

ndvi.title: Multi-Spectral Analysis (NDVI) Dashboard
ndvi.subtitle: Satellite imagery pre and post disaster event timeframe.

insight.title: AI Insight Summary
insight.high_stress: Significant vegetation stress detected across Ha. Estimated crop damage severity is High.
insight.mod_stress: Moderate vegetation changes observed. Estimated crop damage severity is Medium/Low.
insight.correlation: The multi-spectral difference indicates a high correlation with the reported event.

decision.title: Administrator Decision
decision.placeholder: Enter formal review notes and rationale for this decision...

empty.title: Enterprise Claim Verification
empty.desc: Select a farmer's claim from the queue to review deep multi-spectral analysis and automated ML payout recommendations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I draw my farm boundary?
faq.a1: On the 'New Claim' page, you will see an interactive map. Use the polygon tool (the pentagon icon on the left side of the map) to click the corners of your farm. Click on your starting point to close the shape. The system will automatically capture the coordinates.
faq.a2: NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) is a measure of healthy, green vegetation calculated using satellite imagery. We compare NDVI before and after an extreme weather event to accurately estimate crop damage.
faq.a3: Because our system uses automated Google Earth Engine retrieval and Machine Learning prediction, initial processing is instantaneous upon submission. Final approval by an administrator typically occurs within 24-48 hours.

research.subtitle: Macro-level data intelligence with drill-down analytics for PMFBY policy development.
